full_text:
Huang Hao 黃皓
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Hao (黃皓)was born in Yongjung. Eunuch in service to Liu Shan. His advice helped to destroy Shu. Huang Hao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Huang Hao lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
